messages.content: {{SYSTEM}}
Remember I'm a vegetarian.
Saved to memory: 'vegetarian' (stored as a durable user fact).
Got it, vegetarian — noted.
{{SYSTEM}}
Save that my daughter's name is Ada.
Saved to memory: 'daughter's name is Ada' (stored as a durable user fact).
Saved — daughter Ada.
{{SYSTEM}}
Keep in mind I'm lactose intolerant.
Saved to memory: 'lactose intolerant' (stored as a durable user fact).
Got it — lactose intolerant, I'll remember.
{{SYSTEM}}
Note for next time: I live in Portland.
Saved to memory: 'lives in Portland' (stored as a durable user fact).
Noted, Portland.
{{SYSTEM}}
Remember my birthday is March 12.
Saved to memory: 'birthday March 12' (stored as a durable user fact).
Saved — March 12.
{{SYSTEM}}
Please save that I work nights.
Saved to memory: 'works nights' (stored as a durable user fact).
Got it, night-shift worker.
{{SYSTEM}}
Store the fact that I have a nut allergy.
Saved to memory: 'nut allergy' (stored as a durable user fact).
Saved — nut allergy, I'll keep it in mind.
{{SYSTEM}}
Write down that my car is a 2018 Camry.
Saved to memory: 'car is 2018 Camry' (stored as a durable user fact).
Noted — 2018 Camry.
{{SYSTEM}}
Hey, remember I go by Sam, not Samuel.
Saved to memory: 'goes by Sam' (stored as a durable user fact).
Got it, Sam.
{{SYSTEM}}
Jot down that I work as a software engineer.
Saved to memory: 'software engineer' (stored as a durable user fact).
Saved — software engineer.
